svg.title: MERN app view architecture — shopping and admin views
svg.desc: How a MERN ecommerce app is split into auth, shopping, and admin views with route protection

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What goes inside main.jsx in a MERN project?')
sendPrompt('What does App.jsx do in a MERN project?')
sendPrompt('How does AuthLayout work with Outlet?')
sendPrompt('What pages are in the shopping layout?')
sendPrompt('What pages are in the admin layout?')
sendPrompt('How do I build the login page?')
sendPrompt('How do I build the register page?')
sendPrompt('What does the Home page show in an ecommerce app?')
sendPrompt('What does the Products listing page show?')
sendPrompt('What does the Cart page show?')
sendPrompt('What does the Profile page show?')
sendPrompt('What does the admin dashboard show?')
sendPrompt('What does the admin products page do?')
sendPrompt('What does the admin orders page do?')
sendPrompt('How does a public route work in React Router?')
sendPrompt('How do I build a PrivateRoute component in React?')
sendPrompt('How do I build an AdminRoute component in React?')
sendPrompt('How do PrivateRoute and AdminRoute read from authSlice?')
